title: Describe a person who has had a significant influence on your life
bullet_3: what this person has done that influenced you
bullet_4: and explain why this person has been so important to you

title: Describe a teacher who made a strong impression on you
bullet_3: what made them different from other teachers
bullet_4: and explain how they affected your attitude towards learning

title: Describe a famous person you admire
bullet_3: what you know about their life
bullet_4: and explain why you admire them

title: Describe a friend you have known for a long time
bullet_2: how and when you first met
bullet_3: what you usually do together
bullet_4: and explain why this friendship has lasted so long

title: Describe a person in your family who you spend the most time with
bullet_2: what kinds of things you do together
bullet_3: what this person's personality is like
bullet_4: and explain why you spend so much time with this person

title: Describe someone you know who is good at their job
bullet_3: what skills or qualities make them good at it
bullet_4: and explain how you know they are good at their job

title: Describe a person you met recently who you found interesting
bullet_2: where and how you met them
bullet_3: what you talked about
bullet_4: and explain what made this person interesting to you

title: Describe an elderly person you respect
bullet_3: what their life has been like
bullet_4: and explain why you respect this person

title: Describe a place you enjoy visiting in your free time
bullet_3: what you do when you are there
bullet_4: and explain why you enjoy visiting this place

title: Describe a city or town you would like to live in
bullet_1: where this city or town is
bullet_3: what facilities or features it has
bullet_4: and explain why you would like to live there

title: Describe a natural place that impressed you
bullet_3: what you saw and did there
bullet_4: and explain why it made such an impression on you

title: Describe a restaurant or café you like
bullet_2: what kind of food or drinks it serves
bullet_3: who you usually go there with
bullet_4: and explain why you like this place

title: Describe a place in your hometown that you know well
bullet_1: what kind of place it is
bullet_2: how long you have known this place
bullet_3: what happens or what people do there
bullet_4: and explain why this place is important to you

title: Describe a building you find interesting
bullet_3: what it looks like inside and outside
bullet_4: and explain why you find it interesting

title: Describe a foreign country you would like to visit
bullet_2: what you know about this country
bullet_3: what you would do or see there
bullet_4: and explain why you would like to visit this country

title: Describe a public space in your city that you like
bullet_1: what kind of space it is
bullet_3: what people use it for
bullet_4: and explain why you like this place

title: Describe an object that is important to you
bullet_2: how long you have had it
bullet_3: how you use it or what you do with it
bullet_4: and explain why it is important to you

title: Describe a gift you received that you really liked
bullet_2: who gave it to you and when
bullet_3: how you use or keep it
bullet_4: and explain why you liked this gift so much

title: Describe a piece of technology you find useful
bullet_2: how long you have been using it
bullet_3: what you use it for
bullet_4: and explain why you find it so useful

title: Describe a book that you have read more than once
bullet_3: what the book is about
bullet_4: and explain why you have read it more than once

title: Describe something you own that you would find difficult to replace
bullet_2: how long you have had it
bullet_3: what you use it for or what it means to you
bullet_4: and explain why it would be difficult to replace

title: Describe a piece of clothing or jewellery that someone gave you
bullet_3: when you wear or use it
bullet_4: and explain why this item is special to you

title: Describe a musical instrument you would like to learn
bullet_2: how difficult it is to learn
bullet_3: where you could learn to play it
bullet_4: and explain why you want to learn this instrument

title: Describe a photo that means a lot to you
bullet_2: when and where the photo was taken
bullet_3: who took it
bullet_4: and explain why this photo means so much to you

title: Describe an event in your life that you remember well
bullet_3: who was involved
bullet_4: and explain why you remember it so well

title: Describe a celebration or festival you enjoyed
bullet_1: what kind of celebration or festival it was
bullet_2: when and where it took place
bullet_3: what happened during the event
bullet_4: and explain why you enjoyed it

title: Describe a sports event you watched or took part in
bullet_2: when and where this event took place
bullet_3: what happened during the event
bullet_4: and explain how you felt about it

title: Describe a time when you helped someone
bullet_3: how you helped
bullet_4: and explain how you felt after helping

title: Describe a family gathering you enjoyed
bullet_3: what you did or talked about
bullet_4: and explain why you enjoyed this gathering

title: Describe a concert, show, or performance you attended
bullet_1: what kind of performance it was
bullet_2: when and where it took place
bullet_3: who performed and what happened
bullet_4: and explain how this performance made you feel

title: Describe a time you received some good news
bullet_2: when and how you received it
bullet_3: who told you
bullet_4: and explain how you felt when you received the news

title: Describe an important decision you have made in your life
bullet_3: how difficult it was to make
bullet_4: and explain the effect this decision had on your life

title: Describe a time when you learned something new
bullet_2: when and where you learned it
bullet_3: how you went about learning it
bullet_4: and explain how this new skill or knowledge has been useful

title: Describe a time when you overcame a difficulty
bullet_3: what you did to deal with it
bullet_4: and explain what you learned from this experience

title: Describe an experience when you worked as part of a team
bullet_1: what the project or task was
bullet_3: what your role was
bullet_4: and explain whether the teamwork was successful and why

title: Describe a time when you visited somewhere for the first time
bullet_2: when and why you went there
bullet_3: what you did and saw
bullet_4: and explain how you felt visiting this place for the first time

title: Describe a time when you felt proud of something you achieved
bullet_3: how much effort it took
bullet_4: and explain why you felt proud

title: Describe a time when you tried a new food or dish
bullet_1: what the food or dish was
bullet_2: where and when you tried it
bullet_3: what it tasted like
bullet_4: and explain whether you would eat it again and why

title: Describe a time when you had to speak in public
bullet_3: what you said
bullet_4: and explain how you felt before, during, and after speaking

title: Describe a time when something unexpected happened
bullet_3: how you reacted
bullet_4: and explain how this unexpected event affected you
